name: rad-supabase
description: Supabase development and operations — projects, database, migrations, edge functions, auth, storage, realtime, branching, security, troubleshooting. Covers Supabase CLI v2.95+ and Supabase MCP server v0.7+ (31 tools). Ships 3 static validators (audit-rls.py, check-secret-leaks.py, audit-edge-functions.py) that mirror Splinter lint codes 0002/0003/0008/0011/0013/0015 and catch secret leaks before they ship.
